title: Luminarc Pot Club Jar with Lid 1L, 1 Piece
features: Item Package Dimension: 10.5cm L x 10.5cm W x 17.0cm H
description: They can keep anything airtight and dry thanks to their nifty plastic edged lids which create a tight seal. The slightly vintage look has a timeless appearance ideal for storing a range a goods such as cookies, biscuits, spices, baking ingredients, dried fruit etc.
